# remnawave_external_squads (Data Source)

Lists all Remnawave external squads. External squads are managed by name; use this data source to discover existing squad UUIDs for brownfield import.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_external_squads" "all" {}

output "all_external_squads" {
  value = data.remnawave_external_squads.all.external_squads
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `external_squads` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--external_squads))

<a id="nestedatt--external_squads"></a>
### Nested Schema for `external_squads`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) External squad name.
- `uuid` (String) External squad UUID.
